summary: Completed testing of tagged photo workflow including TaggedPhotoModal, Thank Photographer, Suggest Booking, purchase flow, and NEW badge clearing. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: Modal component working, fixed missing photographer_id in /profile/{id}/tagged endpoint.

issues: Console warnings: DialogContent missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby (accessibility)
Console warning about VisuallyHidden component for DialogTitle

action_items: Add DialogTitle and aria-describedby to TaggedPhotoModal for accessibility compliance
Consider wrapping DialogTitle with VisuallyHidden if title should be hidden visually
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/profile/{id}/tagged endpoint was missing photographer_id field needed by TaggedPhotoModal
TaggedPhotoModal correctly shows gallery tier pricing (Web 3c, HD 5c, 4K 10c) for non-session participants
Thank Photographer button successfully sends notification via POST /api/notifications/send
Suggest a Booking navigates to photographer profile with ?action=book param
NEW badge tracking works - is_new=false after viewing via mark-photo-viewed API
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations. PhotoTag records created via /api/ai/confirm-tags during test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tagged photo workflow is fully functional. Key findings: 1) TaggedPhotoModal only opens for own profile (correct privacy behavior) 2) Thank Photographer sends notification successfully 3) Suggest a Booking navigates to photographer profile with action=book param 4) Gallery tier pricing shows correctly for non-session participants 5) Fixed missing photographer_id in /api/profile/{id}/tagged endpoint

backend: GET /api/profile/{id}/tagged - Returns items with is_new, tag_id, photographer_id (PASSED after fix)
GET /api/ai/my-tagged-photos - Returns tagged photos with all pricing fields (PASSED)
frontend: Profile page Tagged tab shows photos with NEW badge support (PASSED)
Clicking tagged photo opens TaggedPhotoModal on own profile (PASSED)
TaggedPhotoModal shows photographer info and pricing tiers (PASSED)
Thank Photographer button sends notification and shows success state (PASSED)
